meta.name: Example cards
meta.description: This is an example file showing how the Plain Card Format works.

cards.title: This is a test card.
cards.description:
This is a description
and it can continue like this in multiple lines,
until it hit's another special character on the next line.

children.title: Nested cards
children.description:
Nest cards have a space under the other card.
Kinda like python.

children.title: Tags
children.description:
At the end of a card you can put text to add a tag to that card.
You can have multiple tags by appending another "[tag" [tag[tag with spaces[tag2

children.title: Check marks.
children.description: As you can see to create a card you put = but you can put a "v" after to mark it as checked.

children.title: Markdown
children.description:
You can use **markdown** in descriptions if you put "*/" and then a new line.
I don't like markdown though, but it supports it anyways!
